positive: A mystical bioluminescent rainforest scene, depicted in a stylized, high-contrast illustration suitable for apparel printing. The central composition features large, gracefully curved monstera leaves and tropical vines forming a detailed, intricate silhouette against a deep twilight background. Subtle glowing elements, like glowing orbs and glowing flora outlines, provide accents of emerald green, sapphire blue, and soft gold light. The composition must be highly decorative and symmetrical, maximizing negative space for clean print definition. Studio lighting, vector art quality, clean linework, deep saturation, 8k illustration.
